key_decisions.decision: Kill terminal dependency via packaged .app + launch-on-login + tray, not a daemon
key_decisions.rationale: electron-builder already configured; uses native Electron lifecycle

key_decisions.decision: Memory as a swappable MemoryStore interface: custom node:sqlite baseline + Mem0 adapter
key_decisions.rationale: honors both user answers without stacking 3 storage layers; doesn't bet centerpiece on unproven Mem0 Node local mode
key_decisions.risk_if_wrong: medium — Phase 2 spike picks the default; baseline always works

key_decisions.decision: Flatten 4 memory types to episodic + semantic + procedural(layer); long-term=retention axis
key_decisions.rationale: avoids over-building 4 subsystems; maps to proven two-tier research design

key_decisions.decision: Composio via one generic MCP client (@modelcontextprotocol/sdk), main process
key_decisions.rationale: any MCP server incl all Composio apps becomes config, not bespoke code
Porcupine free tier dies 2026-06-30; openWakeWord free/Apache; interface removes lock-in
key_decisions.risk_if_wrong: medium — accuracy validated in Phase 5 spike; hotkey fallback

key_decisions.decision: Code signing + per-user safeStorage key onboarding for share-with-few distribution
key_decisions.risk_if_wrong: medium — depends on Apple Developer ID

assumptions_embedded.assumption: ChatGPT-OAuth realtime flow generalizes to each shared user's own account within ToS
assumptions_embedded.tracked_as: R-1/OQ-1 — Phase 1 Task 1 verifies; API-key fallback planned

assumptions_embedded.assumption: Brute-force cosine over hundreds-to-thousands of memories is fast enough (<5ms)
openWakeWord WASM in renderer gives acceptable false-accept rate for 'Hey Lena'
Mem0 Node OSS local/vector mode is production-viable
assumptions_embedded.tracked_as: R-2/OQ-3 — adapter, not default, until validated

what_excluded: Mem0 graph/Neo4j mode (too heavy to ship)
recommendation: Start Phase 1 with Task 1 (verify R-1 auth) before any rename work — it can force an API-key pivot that touches onboarding. Spike Mem0 (R-2) and openWakeWord (R-3) early since the plan's value depends on them. Keep the WakeEngine and MemoryStore interfaces strict — they are the project's main de-risking levers.
